title: HMD Touch 4G | Smart features. Small phone.
excerpt: This compact hybrid phone has a touchscreen, up to 30 hours of the battery life, Express Chat App for text, audio, and video calls, Cloud Phone Service, WiFi, and much more.
content_html:
HMD Touch 4G

It’s not your old keypad phone. It’s not a bulky smartphone. This is a hybrid phone, combining the best of both worlds: Cloud Phone Service, video calls and voice messaging through the Express Chat App with other Express Chat users, Wi-Fi support, and a touchscreen — all in one small package.

Smart features. Small phone.

  • Touchscreen

    Vibrant touchscreen with smooth scrolling.

  • Cloud phone service

    Cricket results, news, weather, and more.

  • Express Chat app

    Video call and voice message with other Express Chat users.

  • Global roaming

    Supports 4G LTE bands for broad network connectivity. ²

What it’s about

The next step in phone evolution

The line between smartphone and feature phone just got a bit smudgy. HMD Touch 4G boasts a vibrant touchscreen — that makes it nice and smooth to swipe between features like the Cloud Phone Service and the Express Chat app for video calls. It does all of this and more while maintaining the simplicity, reliability, and affordability of a feature phone. This is a hybrid phone.

About hybrid phones

Online Chat

The Express Chat app: for expression that breaks barriers

HMD Touch 4G comes with the Express Chat app for texting and video calling with other Express Chat users. Chat one-on-one or in groups, even with smartphone users. The Express Chat app is free to download for Android™ and iOS® devices. Just another way HMD Touch 4G bridges the feature phone and smartphone worlds.

  • Video calling

    Use the selfie camera to video call with other Express Chat users.

  • Voice messaging

    Hold the Quick-Call button to record a voice message.

  • Text chat

    Send texts, photos, and emojis in private chats and groups.

  • For smartphones

    Express Chat is free to download on Android and iOS® devices.

Global roaming

Take your HMD Touch 4G around the world with you

Enjoy HD voice calls and other online features while you travel. With support for a wide range of 4G LTE bands, HMD Touch 4G helps you make the most of global networks around the world.

Cloud phone service

A world of smart experiences

Entertainment, socials, games, friends, and finding information — that’s what Cloud Phone Service is all about. Whether you want to check the latest videos, view tomorrow’s weather forecast, or read up on the latest cricket results, it’s all just a few touches away on HMD Touch 4G through cloud-hosted browser shortcuts.

Packed with big features

  • Quick-call button

    For emergency contact calling and voice message recording.

  • Connectivity

    WiFi support, hotspot feature, and Bluetooth enabled.

  • Cameras

    Capture photos and videos with front and back cameras.

  • Battery

    1950 mAh battery and USB Type-C charging. ¹

Design

Smart features in a little package

HMD Touch 4G combines the modern, clean-cut look of a smartphone with the compact form of a feature phone to give you a stylish, easy-to-use device. It easily fits your pocket, your bag, and your lifestyle.

Supporting human connections

We are Human Mobile Devices, the maker of Nokia phones and HMD phones, accessories, and more. It’s our belief that technology should serve people through meaningful human innovation. We bring this to life with our reliable and durable feature phones and comprehensive, affordable smartphones. All while remaining committed to our globally-recognized sustainability efforts.

About us

Currently only available in India.

sentences.en: Apple, the Apple logo, and App Store are trademarks of Apple Inc., registered in the U.S. and other countries.
sentences.zh: Apple、Apple 徽标和 App Store 是 Apple Inc. 在美国和其他国家/地区注册的商标。

blocks.html_en: IOS is a registered trademark or trademark of Cisco Systems, Inc. and/or its affiliates in the United States and certain other countries.

sentences.en: IOS is a registered trademark or trademark of Cisco Systems, Inc. and/or its affiliates in the United States and certain other countries.
sentences.zh: IOS 是 Cisco Systems, Inc. 和/或其附属公司在美国和某些其他国家/地区的注册商标或商标。

blocks.html_en: ¹Battery has limited recharge cycles and battery capacity reduces over time. Eventually the battery may need to be replaced.

sentences.en: ¹Battery has limited recharge cycles and battery capacity reduces over time.

sentences.en: Eventually the battery may need to be replaced.
sentences.zh: 最终可能需要更换电池。

content_html_zh:
头显触摸4G

这不是您的旧键盘手机。 它不是笨重的智能手机。 这是一款混合手机，结合了两全其美的优点：云电话服务、通过 Express Chat 应用程序与其他 Express Chat 用户进行视频通话和语音消息、Wi-Fi 支持和触摸屏 - 所有这些都集中在一个小包中。

智能功能。 小手机。

  • 触摸屏充满活力的触摸屏，滚动流畅。
  • 云电话服务板球结果、新闻、天气等。
  • Express Chat 应用程序与其他 Express Chat 用户进行视频通话和语音消息。
  • 全球漫游支持 4G LTE 频段以实现广泛的网络连接。 ²

这是关于什么的

手机进化的下一步

智能手机和功能手机之间的界限变得有点模糊。 HMD Touch 4G 拥有充满活力的触摸屏，可以在云电话服务和视频通话快速聊天应用程序等功能之间轻松流畅地滑动。 它在实现所有这些以及更多功能的同时，保持了功能手机的简单性、可靠性和经济性。 这是一款混合手机。

关于混合电话

在线聊天

Express Chat 应用程序：用于打破障碍的表达

HMD Touch 4G 附带 Express Chat 应用程序，可与其他 Express Chat 用户进行短信和视频通话。 一对一或群组聊天，甚至与智能手机用户聊天。 适用于 Android™ 和 iOS® 设备的 Express Chat 应用程序可免费下载。 HMD Touch 4G 是连接功能手机和智能手机世界的另一种方式。

  • 视频通话使用自拍相机与其他 Express Chat 用户进行视频通话。
  • 语音消息 按住快速呼叫按钮可录制语音消息。
  • 文本聊天在私人聊天和群组中发送文本、照片和表情符号。
  • 对于智能手机，Express Chat 可在 Android 和 iOS® 设备上免费下载。

全球漫游

随身携带 HMD Touch 4G 环游世界

在旅行时享受高清语音通话和其他在线功能。 HMD Touch 4G 支持广泛的 4G LTE 频段，可帮助您充分利用世界各地的全球网络。

云电话服务

智能体验的世界

娱乐、社交、游戏、交友、查找信息——这就是云电话服务的全部内容。 无论您是想查看最新视频、查看明天的天气预报，还是阅读最新的板球比赛结果，只需通过云托管的浏览器快捷方式在 HMD Touch 4G 上进行几次触摸即可实现。

具有强大的功能

  • 快速呼叫按钮用于紧急联系呼叫和语音留言录制。
  • 连接性 WiFi 支持、热点功能和蓝牙功能。
  • 相机使用前置和后置摄像头拍摄照片和视频。
  • 电池 1950 mAh 电池和 USB Type-C 充电。 ^

设计

小包装中的智能功能

HMD Touch 4G 将智能手机现代、简洁的外观与功能手机的紧凑外形相结合，为您提供一款时尚、易于使用的设备。 它可轻松适合您的口袋、包和您的生活方式。

支持人际关系

我们是 Human Mobile Devices，是诺基亚手机和 HMD 手机、配件等产品的制造商。 我们相信，技术应该通过有意义的人类创新来服务人类。 我们通过可靠耐用的功能手机和功能齐全、价格实惠的智能手机将这一点变为现实。 同时继续致力于我们全球认可的可持续发展努力。

关于我们

目前仅在印度提供。保留所有权利。 所提供的所有规格、功能和其他产品信息如有更改，恕不另行通知。 所有图片仅供说明之用。Google、Android 和 Google Play 是 Google LLC 的商标。Apple、Apple 徽标和 App Store 是 Apple Inc. 在美国和其他国家/地区注册的商标。IOS 是 Cisco Systems, Inc. 和/或其附属公司在美国和某些其他国家/地区的注册商标或商标。Bluetooth 文字标记和徽标是 Bluetooth SIG, Inc. 拥有的注册商标，HMD Global 对此类标记的任何使用均已获得许可。USB Type-C™ 是USB 实施者论坛的商标。1电池的充电周期有限，并且电池容量会随着时间的推移而减少。 最终可能需要更换电池。
